text:
Facebox (フェイスボックス, Feisubokkusu) is a social media website in the world of Hunter × Hunter. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 350 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Prince Halkenburg Hui Guo Rou once noted on his Facebox page that his older step brother Prince Tserriednich Hui Guo Rou is the one prince he accepts. 

Trivia

Facebox's real-life counterpart is Facebook.

References

 

de:Facebox
